package.name: Pipe Harness
package.description: Build pipe/hose harness assemblies: import STEP components, mark connection points on them (or on native FreeCAD bodies), snap components together by matching up ports, and route flexible hose/pipe runs as chains of straight and bend segments. Includes component grounding, joint propagation, a grab-move-drop mover, and a local parts library.

workbench.name: Pipe Harness
workbench.description: Build pipe/hose harness assemblies in 3D from imported or native components.
